title: Petface Toyz Rugby Ball Dog Toy, Large, Green
features: TOUGH TOY: Keep your dog stimulated with this large, rugby ball-shaped dog toy made of tough and natural rubber
KEY FEATURES: Designed to withstand rough playtime, non-toxic material ensures safe play for pets
QUALITY TREAT: Provide your furry friend with hours of interactive fun and entertainment with this durable rugby ball toy
PLAYTIME FUN: Let your dog enjoy playing fetch or carry around their new favourite green pet accessory

KEEPING SAFE: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘Chew’ Damage. Please supervise your pet with this toy, and examine regularly for wear and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird for great, affordable products! Toyz by Petface Rugby Ball Dog Toy Petface Toys Rugby Ball Dog Toy is sure to provide your dog with hours of fun. Dogs love the water and the new range of 'Toys' float, making them great for fun games on land and in the water. These coloured toys are made from a blend of durable and non- toxic synthetic materials and interactive fun to allow the dog and their owner an enjoyable shared play experience. The exercise helps to keep them fit. Toyz by Petface Rugby Ball Dog Toy About Petface All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. Treat your pampered pooch! Treat your pampered pooch to this rugby ball toy, perfect for throw and fetch games. This fun toy can help to develop your pet's sense of play and exercise, helping them to stay fit and healthy. Your dog's best friend! Ideal for interactive play indoors or outdoors, the Toyz Rugby Ball Dog Toy is great for throw and fetch or for keeping your dog amused when left to their own devices.
